ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  "production_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production method */,
  "creative_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creative type */,
  "theatrical_distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theatrical distributor */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "worldwide_release_date" TEXT /* Worldwide release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Synopsis of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_theatrical_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("theatrical_distributor_id") REFERENCES theatrical_distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_production_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_method_id") REFERENCES production_methods ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_creative_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("creative_type_id") REFERENCES creative_types ("creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theatrical_distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theatrical distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the theatrical distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the distributor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_methods" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production method */,
  "production_name" TEXT /* Name of the production method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creative_types" (
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creative type */,
  "creative_name" TEXT /* Name of the creative type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the creative type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production budget */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Production budget for the movie */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Marketing budget for the movie */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_budgets_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_data" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office data entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_rank" INTEGER /* Opening weekend rank of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_revenue" REAL /* Opening weekend revenue of the movie */,
  "domestic_box_office" REAL /* Domestic box office revenue of the movie */,
  "infl_adj_domestic_box_office" REAL /* Inflation-adjusted domestic box office revenue of the movie */,
  "international_box_office" REAL /* International box office revenue of the movie */,
  "worldwide_box_office" REAL /* Worldwide box office revenue of the movie */,
  "weekend_1_revenue" REAL /* Weekend 1 revenue of the movie */,
  "weekend_2_revenue" REAL /* Weekend 2 revenue of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_data_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., executive, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
